application.one_liner: Deterministic reproducibility tooling for ML-driven finance workflows.
application.use_of_funds_summary: Hire two engineers, ship the reproducibility harness, run six pilot deployments across banking and healthcare customers.

fixture_purpose: Offline end-to-end reproducibility integration test (prompt 16). This founder/application pair is driven through the workflow orchestrator twice with identical inputs; the decision_artifact bytes from the two runs must match after excluding fields that legitimately vary per run (application_id, session_id, occurred_at, artifact_id). Do NOT edit without also updating tests/integration/test_e2e_pipeline.py.
